row.title: Task-Agnostic Knowledge Distillation for Compressing Large Language Models
row.abstract: We study task-agnostic knowledge distillation for compressing large-scale language models.
row.full_paper:
Task-Agnostic Knowledge Distillation

We introduce a compression method for large-scale language models.

row.title: Token and Sentence Level Hallucination Detection
row.abstract: This paper studies post-hoc hallucination detection for neural sequence generation.
row.full_paper:
Hallucination Detection

We detect hallucinations at token and sentence levels.
